error.no_ads_hosts: No reachable ADS router endpoint found in the scanned range.

auto_discovery.description: Choose how you want to set up ADS. Auto discovery scans your network, manual setup lets you enter the values yourself, and YAML import reuses an old config.

network_scan.description: Probe the configured subnet for hosts with an open ADS router port.

data.search_legacy_yaml: Search for local legacy YAML config

network_pick.description: Select a discovered host and confirm connection parameters.

data.use_legacy_yaml: Use values from discovered legacy YAML config

network_legacy_choice.description: A legacy ADS YAML config was found. Choose whether to apply its values.

user.description: Set up ADS for your Beckhoff PLC. Pick the option that matches how your PLC is configured.

menu_options.auto_discovery: Auto discovery - scan the network for an ADS target
menu_options.manual: Manual setup - enter AMS Net ID, IP address, and port
menu_options.yaml_import: Import from legacy YAML - reuse an existing YAML config

data.scan_legacy_yaml: Search and prefill from local legacy YAML

manual.description: Configure the ADS connection to your Beckhoff PLC.

init.description: Import GVL variables for faster PLC variable matching and tune logging.

import_gvl.description: Import GVL variables from text or a file and store them in ADS options.

entry_id.description: Optional ADS config entry id. If omitted, the first ADS config entry is used.
entry_id.name: Config entry id

gvl_file_path.description: Absolute path to a GVL file to parse.
gvl_file_path.name: GVL file path

gvl_import_replace.description: Replace existing imported variables instead of merging by name.
gvl_import_replace.name: Replace existing

import_gvl.name: Import GVL

write_data_by_name.description: Write a value to the connected ADS device.

entry_id.description: Optional ADS config entry id. If omitted, the default ADS connection is used.
entry_id.name: Config entry id

adstype.description: The data type of the variable to write to.
adstype.name: ADS type

adsvar.description: The name of the variable to write to.
adsvar.name: ADS variable

value.description: The value to write to the variable.
value.name: Value

write_data_by_name.name: Write data by name
